case_title: EVA SIU LAN NG VS. FLORENCE CHENG

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NG, EVA SIU LAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHENG, FLORENCE $6,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,575.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: $6500 BUT PLAINTIFF MUST RETURN THE JADE, THE SHELF AND THE MUSIC TABLE. SEE ATTACHED MEMORANDUM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, EVA SIU LAN
ORDER DENYING REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SC-108)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-09-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-09-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF EVA SIU LAN NG IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-COURT-CERTIFIED INTERPRETER SHARON CHANG. DEFENDANT FLORENCE CHENG IS PRESENT. THE INTERPRETER IN THIS MATTER WAS GIVE THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY CLERK R. SAHAJTIAN. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-09-2018 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG, FLORENCE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY NG, EVA SIU LAN AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG, FLORENCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED SEP-24-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG, FLORENCE
(SC-108) ANSWER TO REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CHENG, FLORENCE
